text: Alamadiyaf al-Masiyyah's PUSU deadline extended to 29 July
Shareholders approve the scheme, with 99.68% of votes. Completion expected during Q3 2026.
Prologis publishes presentation setting out strategic and financial rationale of proposal. Segro responds that Prologis is trying to acquire it "on the cheap".
Acceler8 Ventures Plc announces £600m formal all-share offer on same terms as indicative offer.
New party approached company on 8 June 2026, such that discussions are now ongoing with two parties.
